title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at The Man Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, The Man Company in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Man Company:
The Man Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Man Company!
